message:
robot: add unit tests for TOON encoder pure functions (bd-2qkra)

Cover encodeValue, encodeString, formatFloat, extractFields,
getFieldValue, isTabSafe, renderArray, renderTabular, renderObject
with 50+ test cases. Raises robot package coverage from 46.7% to 48.1%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -500,6 +500,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2qdhp","title":"CRITICAL: Always send Enter twice after marching orders","description":"When sending marching orders to agents via tmux send-keys, Enter must be sent TWICE.

## The Problem
Agents appear to receive marching orders but never start processing them.

## Root Cause
A single Enter key press may not reliably submit the message in Claude Code / Codex CLI.
The message sits in the input buffer without being submitted.

## The Fix
After sending the marching orders text, ALWAYS send Enter twice with a small delay:

```bash
# Send marching orders (no Enter at end)
tmux send-keys -t "$session:1.$pane" "$msg"
sleep 1
# CRITICAL: Send Enter TWICE
tmux send-keys -t "$session:1.$pane" Enter
sleep 0.5
tmux send-keys -t "$session:1.$pane" Enter
```

## Code Locations to Fix
- internal/commands/spawn.go - sendMarchingOrders()
- internal/commands/send.go - sendToPane()
- Any function that sends text to agent panes

## Testing
After fix, verify with:
```bash
tmux capture-pane -t session:1.1 -p | tail -20
```
Should show agent actively processing, not waiting at input prompt.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T09:31:04.196222340Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T18:14:57.484887937Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T18:14:57.484842011Z","close_reason":"Send prompts with double Enter and delays across CLI agent sends","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2qfa5","title":"Task: Define ReasoningMode struct and related types in internal/ensemble/types.go","description":"# Task: Define ReasoningMode struct and related types

**STATUS: PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED**

The following types are now implemented in internal/ensemble/types.go:

## Implemented Types

### Core Mode Types
- ReasoningMode - Mode definition with ID, Name, Category, etc.
- ReasoningCategory - Category enum (Formal, Ampliative, etc.)
- ModeCatalog - Indexed catalog with lookup methods

### Output Schema Types (NEW - Critical for mechanical merging)
- ImpactLevel - high/medium/low enum with validation
- Confidence - 0.0-1.0 score with validation
- Finding - Discovery with impact, confidence, evidence_pointer
- Risk - Potential problem with severity, likelihood
- Recommendation - Suggested action with priority, effort
- Question - Unresolved query for user
- FailureModeWarning - Reasoning pitfall warning
- ModeOutput - Complete output schema (mandatory for all modes)

### Configuration Types
- BudgetConfig - Token limits, timeouts, retries
- SynthesisConfig - Strategy, min confidence, max findings
- Ensemble - Curated mode collection (primary user interface)
- SynthesisStrategy - Enum (consensus, adversarial, etc.)

## Remaining Work
- None - types are complete

## Test Coverage
- types_test.go includes comprehensive validation tests
- All Validate() methods tested
- Default config functions tested

 {"id":"bd-2qk3f","title":"Task: Implement ntm scrub (scan + report)","description":"## Scope
Implement `ntm scrub` to scan configured directories/files.

## Inputs
- Default scan roots: NTM config dir artifacts.
- Flags:
  - `--path` (repeatable)
  - `--since` (if scanning time-partitioned logs)
  - `--format` (`text|json`)

## Output
- For each finding:
  - file path
  - category
  - redacted preview snippet
  - byte offset or line number

## Acceptance Criteria
- Uses redaction engine for detection.
- Read-only by default.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:31:23.294673048Z","created_by":"OrangeWolf","updated_at":"2026-02-01T21:43:56.518024961Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T21:43:56.517956814Z","close_reason":"Implemented ntm scrub (scan + report)","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qk3f","depends_on_id":"bd-1bsp3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:48:38Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qk3f","depends_on_id":"bd-2eph9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:48:38Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2qq5u","title":"Task: CLI vs REST parity test harness","description":"## Scope\nBuild parity tests that compare CLI/robot outputs to REST outputs for deterministic commands.\n\n## Logging Requirements\n- Log CLI output, REST output, and normalized diff.\n\n## Tests\n- Session list/status, pane capture, output summary, metrics export.\n- Normalize fields like timestamps/request_id before compare.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Parity tests catch mismatches deterministically.\n- Failures provide actionable diff output.\n","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T22:54:53.643194587Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:31:57.270322513Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T22:31:57.270105794Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qq5u","depends_on_id":"bd-12vyy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq5u","depends_on_id":"bd-204ic","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq5u","depends_on_id":"bd-30zp4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq5u","depends_on_id":"bd-3iomn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq5u","depends_on_id":"bd-vmwdj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2qwm8","title":"Feature: Synthesis System - Combining multi-mode outputs","description":"# Feature: Synthesis System - Stage 3 of pipeline

**Two-path synthesis architecture:**
- **Agent-based**: Synthesizer + Disagreement Auditor
- **Manual/Mechanical**: No synthesizer agent; deterministic merge + auditor only

## Stage 3 Components

### 1. Output Collector
- Validate each output against OutputSchema
- Flag non-compliant outputs
- Aggregate into SynthesisInput

### 2. Synthesizer Agent (when strategy requires agent)
- Merge outputs into cohesive report
- Rank findings by impact × confidence
- Generate executive summary

### 3. Disagreement Auditor
- Identify contradictory theses and risks
- Surface conflicts and resolution paths

### 4. Output Formatter
- Markdown/JSON/YAML export of SynthesisResult
- Deterministic ordering

## Strategy Support
- Manual strategies should **skip synthesizer agent** but still run auditor + formatter.
- Agent strategies use templates from bd-3k4sh and definitions from bd-2ztw9.

## Files
- internal/ensemble/collector.go
- internal/ensemble/synthesizer.go
- internal/ensemble/auditor.go
- internal/ensemble/merge.go
- internal/ensemble/formatter.go","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"claude-opus-4.5","created_at":"2026-01-23T07:26:02.694077251Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T07:56:29.175540344Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T07:56:29.175514615Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qwm8","depends_on_id":"bd-12u4u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qwm8","depends_on_id":"bd-2ouwm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qwm8","depends_on_id":"bd-49fb9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
